subject: Inquiry on Strategic Platform Expansion into AI/ML Workloads
body_paragraphs: I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to discuss Northwind Analytics' strategic intent to expand into AI and machine learning workloads, particularly leveraging graph capabilities. As we explore this new direction, it is crucial for us to evaluate additional product options that align with our goals.

Given the complexity and potential of AI/ML applications, I believe it would be beneficial for us to assess various solutions that can support our expansion. I would appreciate your insights on the available options and any recommendations you might have based on your expertise in this area. Let's schedule a time to discuss this further and outline our next steps.
Thank you for your attention to this matter. I look forward to your response and to collaborating on this exciting opportunity.
